programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Journalist Paul Beban follows the biggest paranormal mysteries and tries to unravel them.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The series brings closer the secrets of the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The series brings closer the secrets of the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: A group of specialists research various theories and the latest reports regarding monsters straight from legends and scary stories.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: A group of specialists research various theories and the latest reports regarding monsters straight from legends and scary stories.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has created a team of researchers with whom he checks reports of paranormal phenomena and mysterious objects and creatures.The team will reach, among others, Mexico and the Cambodian jungle.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has created a team of researchers with whom he checks reports of paranormal phenomena and mysterious objects and creatures.The team will reach, among others, Mexico and the Cambodian jungle.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The fifteenth season of the program, thanks to which we have the opportunity to observe how complicated the production processes of the simplest items we use every day can be.

programme.desc: The fifteenth season of the program, thanks to which we have the opportunity to observe how complicated the production processes of the simplest items we use every day can be.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: How It's Made 25
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: One of the mythbusters, Adam Savage, uses knowledge and skills to prepare unique structures.It does this with the help of experts in their fields and technology enthusiasts from around the world.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: One of the mythbusters, Adam Savage, uses knowledge and skills to prepare unique structures.It does this with the help of experts in their fields and technology enthusiasts from around the world.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators of the program present various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of astronomy.The series will use innovative computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators of the program present various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of astronomy.The series will use innovative computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How It's Made 24
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.

programme.title: How It's Made 24
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.

programme.title: Extraterrestrials: They Are Among Us 2
programme.desc: Experts analyze the history of Spain.As it turns out, it contains numerous stories about aliens.Documentarians look for evidence in prehistoric myths and modern incidents.

programme.title: American Titans
programme.desc: Rockefeller, Carnegie, Ford, Edison and Stanford - many of the organizations existing today bear the names of these famous Americans.They entered the lists of the most influential, talented and richest people due to their passions, inventions, achievements, and, rarely, by accident.They are treated by many as the founding fathers of the ranking of the 500 largest companies.Before they gained fame, each of them took great risks, thanks to which, after the period of the industrial revolution, they introduced America in the second half of the 19th century into the so-calledgilded age.

programme.title: Tesla's Death Ray: A Murder Declassified
programme.desc: The series presents the achievements of the famous inventor Nikola Tesla and conspiracy theories regarding his mysterious death.The engineer from Serbia is the author of nearly 300 patents, most of which are still used by people today.His working methods, including his experiments, aroused much controversy, which made him considered an eccentric and dangerous person.When he died unexpectedly in his New York apartment in 1943, his notes on his work were allegedly stolen.This gave rise to numerous conjectures and alleged scenarios of events.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: The series tells the stories of places where incidents involving extraterrestrials probably occurred.Chuck Zukowski and his team of specialists explain the mysteries related to UFOs.

programme.title: Building Germany
programme.desc: Viewers will look at the everyday life of people who work on the largest infrastructure projects in Germany.We will find out what people doing difficult and dangerous jobs do.

programme.title: Building Germany
programme.desc: Viewers will look at the everyday life of people who work on the largest infrastructure projects in Germany.We will find out what people doing difficult and dangerous jobs do.

programme.title: The Dino Hunters
programme.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.
